Adding-TinaCMS-To-My-Astro-Site.thumbAlt: A symbolic split-scene illustration showing the evolution of creative work. On the left: a designer/developer in the early 2000s deeply focused on mastering a single tool. Photoshop palettes, Dreamweaver windows, FTP apps, and thick manuals surround them in a cluttered office. On the right: the same person years later in a clean futuristic workspace orchestrating multiple AI agents through lightweight prompts and skill files. Instead of mastering one application, glowing “recipes” and workflow diagrams float between AI systems. The transition visually represents moving from software expertise to orchestration expertise. Detailed cinematic composition, realistic textures, thoughtful and slightly philosophical tone
